item.title: MacOS Chroma Key

item.title: macOS 27 Golden Gate: Beta 2 Unveils Hidden Gems
item.description: Explore macOS 27 Golden Gate Beta 2’s groundbreaking features, performance boosts, and hidden tools reshaping Apple’s ecosystem.
